  "deviation": "The process name 'happy_image.jpeg.exe' is highly suspicious, masquerading as an image file while being an executable. It then extracts another executable named 'winx64_payload.exe' into a temporary directory, which is a strong indicator of a dropper or self-extracting malware.",
